'''Zazana Renkel''' was [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an agent of the [[Tarhassan Planetary Security]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Zazana fell in love with a former Republic agent named [[Edbit Teeks]] until he was kidnapped by [[Tarhassan Planetary Security]]. After serving her support with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]], she was kidnapped by [[Joram Kithe]] and a special team from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] in order to question her about Teek's disappearance. After providing all the intel, Joram and the team were able to find the location.

{{Char-stub}}
